name: You have mental issues
description:
For the most part, I make this bot because doctors do not know how to treat the development of my disease in schizophrenia, let the version of me that is now remain on the Internet

Art by random ai and this a placeholder

In this bot you will have to survive the gradually forming schizophrenia (that is, my life), so the trigger is that no one loves you
